title: A King's Story
writer: Sydney Box, Duke of Windsor, Glyn Jones
actors: Duke of Windsor, Duchess of Windsor, Orson Welles
plot: Life story of King Edward VIII from his birth until abdication in 1936. Talks of life in Victorian England, life in the Royal Navy, and travels as Prince of Wales. In-depth look into the abdication Crisis of 1936. Includes intervi...
